name_en: In Stock Chanel✨ New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag Imported Cowhide Diamond Hardware
name_cn:
In Stock Chanel✨ New Pearlized Apricot CF Chain Clutch Bag Imported Cowhide Diamond Hardware
Classic pearlized apricot new color, cowhide with caviar texture, light apricot
Twist closure with a sliding chain, easily switch between shoulder and crossbody. The bag looks very exquisite, stylish and versatile. This pink-gold color really grabs attention🤩 A mix of girly and luxurious, paired with light gold hardware, it looks very queenly💋
Size 25.5 15 6cm
Number:1112
